The '''Lowen''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Near-Human]]s from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Low'n]]. They were distinguishable from baseline [[Human/Legends|Humans]] by the fleshy tendrils that hung from their heads, their flat [[Nose/Legends|noses]], and their loose, thick fleshy skin that bundled and folded up around their neck, shoulders, back, chest, and [[Limb/Legends|arms]].<ref name="SWAJ10:WBC" />

[[Ostan Atur]] was a Lowen [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]].<ref name="SWAJ10:WBC" />

{{Species-stub}}
